positive: A vibrant, stylized geometric celestial forest landscape. The main subject is a group of bioluminescent, stylized trees forming a canopy of crystalline shapes. The forest floor features meandering river paths made of obsidian and jade, reflecting abstract patterns of nebulae and star clusters. Include gentle, stylized floating jellyfish and orbs of soft light meandering through the air. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets psychedelic geometrics. Color Direction: Deep cosmic indigo, electric teal, luminous violet, and accents of iridescent gold. Composition: Symmetrical, centered view, perfect for seamless repeating pattern or central apparel graphic. Lighting: High contrast dramatic lighting with soft, diffused glow from the bioluminescence, giving a starry, enchanted feel. Detail: Ultra-detailed, crisp lines, vector-like quality, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, artifact, text, watermark, signature, noise, extra limbs, low quality, poor anatomy, gradient wash, photo-realism, messy, cluttered, logo, writing, copyright
